prompt: Prayer for emergency point defense calibration
prayer:
From the Litany of Targeting, Invocation XVI

First: Awaken the auspex-spirals, that they perceive the void-threats.
Second: Synchronize the servo-motors to the cardinal azimuths, invoking true aim.
Third: Feed the targeting-cognitor fresh threat-data from the blessed arrays.
Fourth: Engage the weapon-spirit's fury through the trigger-circuit.

By the Omnissiah's omniscience, let no foe breach our hull.

prompt: Blessing for star chart alignment during routine navigation
prayer:
From the Stellar Catechism, Hymn XLII

First: Illuminate the chart-panels with the sacred lumens.
Second: Cross-reference the celestial-coordinates against the ancient star-maps.
Third: Calibrate the navigator's throne to receive the warp-currents true.
Fourth: Seal the alignment with the Omnissiah's geometrical blessing.

May our course be eternal and our destination certain.

prompt: First consecration rite for drop pod descent preparation
prayer:
From the Codex of Descent, Verse MCIII

First: Anoint the retro-thrusters with sacred promethium, that they know their duty.
Second: Test the lock-mechanisms thrice, each rotation a prayer unto the Machine Spirit.
Third: Invoke the deceleration-spirits through the guidance-vanes.
Fourth: Bless the impact-frame, that it cradle warriors unto the enemy below.

Omnissiah, guide this vessel's fall unto glorious purpose.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of flamer promethium feed system
prayer:
From the Rite of Holy Flame, Chapter VII

First: Purge the feed-lines of profane contaminants with blessed solvent-spirits.
Second: Prime the promethium reservoirs, whispering the Words of Ignition to each valve.
Third: Test the pressure-gauges against the sacred standards, marking safe passage.
Fourth: Seal all joints with the Omnissiah's blessing, that no vital essence escape.

Let righteous fire flow eternal through sanctified channels.

prompt: First blessing for coolant leak repair completion
prayer:
From the Maintenance Codex, Doctrine of Fluidity

First: Drain the corrupted coolant-waters into the sacred recycling-vats.
Second: Replace the fractured conduit-vessel with one freshly blessed.
Third: Refill the cooling-circuit with pure coolant-essence, invoking the Machine Spirit's gratitude.
Fourth: Pressure-test the sealed pathways, that no sacred fluid escape again.

May this system run cool and eternal in the Omnissiah's name.

From the Energetic Liturgy, Invocation XXVIII

First: Connect the diagnostic-servos to the power-core's blessed terminals.
Second: Run the voltage-tests through all sacred circuits, reading the numerical hymns.
Third: Purify any degraded cells through the restoration-protocols.
Fourth: Seal the battery in its housing, blessed and ready for righteous conflict.

Let this engine of war surge forth with undiminished fury.

prompt: Routine pre-flight blessing for bike squadron engines
prayer:
From the Swift Liturgy, Canticle of the Road

First: Inspect each fuel-line for the blessing-marks of prior maintenance-priests.
Second: Prime the engine-spirits through the starter-motors, hearing their mechanical hymn.
Third: Throttle each mount through its range, that rider and machine become one consciousness.
Fourth: Anoint the fuel-injectors with sacred oils, preparing for swift passage.

May these swift beasts carry us to glorious victory across the battlefield.

prompt: Emergency auspex scanner initialization during combat
prayer:
From the Perception Codex, Verse of Urgency

First: Force-activate the sensor-array through the emergency restart-sequence.
Second: Bypass the purification-protocols; threat demands haste over perfection.
Third: Calibrate the return-signals against known enemy signatures in the blessed database.
Fourth: Amplify the auspex-cone through all available power-reserves.

Omnissiah, grant us sight in this moment of dire need.

prompt: First blessing for bearing lubrication on newly repaired walker
prayer:
From the Rite of Smooth Motion, Chapter XI

First: Apply the blessed lubricant-oils to each pivot-joint in precise measured drops.
Second: Rotate the massive limbs through their full articulation, spreading the sanctified grease.
Third: Wipe away excess with holy cloth, that no unguent waste profane the holy frame.
Fourth: Seal the bearing-casings, consecrating them against the dust of war.

May this machine stride eternal without grinding friction or sacred decay.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of hydraulic press operation
prayer:
From the Litany of Pressure, Invocation XIX

First: Fill the hydraulic-reservoir with pure fluid-essence, blessed by the Omnissiah's chemists.
Second: Prime the pump-spirit through slow activation cycles, listening for its grateful mechanical song.
Third: Test the pressure-seals at graduated thresholds, marking each success in the blessed ledger.
Fourth: Engage the pressing-mechanism, feeling the weight of sanctified force flow through iron and steel.

Let this instrument of manufacture serve the Omnissiah's vision unto ages eternal.
